channel.title: Weekly on Chaos Talk
channel.description: Recent content in Weekly on Chaos Talk

item.title: Weekly Summary 2023-05-01
item.author: blog@chaoruan.dev (Chao Ruan)
item.description: The cover features the little princess urging us to go to sleep.

item.title: Weekly Summary 2023-04-23
item.author: blog@chaoruan.dev (Chao Ruan)
item.description: The cover features my newly custom Cthulhu-style keycaps and an aviator cable. Love it!

item.title: Weekly Summary 2023-04-16
item.author: blog@chaoruan.dev (Chao Ruan)
item.description: The cover photo is of a coffee made by my wife. Over the past few years, her latte art skills have become quite exceptional.

item.title: Weekly Summary 2023-04-09
item.author: blog@chaoruan.dev (Chao Ruan)
item.description: I’ve decided to start documenting my weekly life by providing a brief summary of what I’ve read, watched, and done in the past week.
